html:
2026-0644
2026-06-22FINCustoms TariffOrder Amending the United States Surtax Remission Order (2025)Order Amending the United States Surtax Remission Order (2025) in order to (1) extend remission to (i) 293 products which remits surtaxes to any importer in respect of products that have been determined to be in short supply; (ii) 4 products which remits surtaxes to any importer in respect of products imported from the United States (U.S.) on a time-limited basis; (iii) 235 products which remit surtaxes for certain products imported from the U.S. due to exceptional circumstances that could have significant adverse impacts on the Canadian economy, such as preexisting contractual obligations; (iv) 179 products to remit surtaxes to any importer in respect of steel mill products that have been determined not to be produced in Canada; and (2) extend relief for (i) public health, health care, public safety and national security purposes until June 30, 2027; (ii) manufacturing, processing, food and beverage packaging or agricultural production until June 30, 2027; (iii) the manufacturing of motor vehicles, aerospace goods, and their parts until June 30, 2027.Registration: SOR/2026-0154 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: Order Amending the United States Surtax Remission Order (2025)
precis: Order Amending the United States Surtax Remission Order (2025) in order to (1) extend remission to (i) 293 products which remits surtaxes to any importer in respect of products that have been determined to be in short supply; (ii) 4 products which remits surtaxes to any importer in respect of products imported from the United States (U.S.) on a time-limited basis; (iii) 235 products which remit surtaxes for certain products imported from the U.S. due to exceptional circumstances that could have significant adverse impacts on the Canadian economy, such as preexisting contractual obligations; (iv) 179 products to remit surtaxes to any importer in respect of steel mill products that have been determined not to be produced in Canada; and (2) extend relief for (i) public health, health care, public safety and national security purposes until June 30, 2027; (ii) manufacturing, processing, food and beverage packaging or agricultural production until June 30, 2027; (iii) the manufacturing of motor vehicles, aerospace goods, and their parts until June 30, 2027.
